task_completion.description: Verify a daily chart for SPY is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chart window is visible with 'SPY' as the instrument and the timeframe set to Daily (often indicated by 'D' or 'Daily' in the chart tab or title bar).

task_completion.description: Verify the Chart Trader panel is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Chart Trader panel is visible, typically attached to the right side of the SPY chart window, showing order entry buttons (Buy/Sell) and parameters.

task_completion.description: Verify the account is set to Sim101.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Account' dropdown menu within the Chart Trader panel displays 'Sim101'.

task_completion.description: Verify the default order quantity is set to 200.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Order quantity' or 'Qty' field within the Chart Trader panel is set to the number 200.

task_completion.description: Verify the default order type is set to Limit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Order Type dropdown or selection field in the Chart Trader panel is set to 'Limit' or 'LMT'.

task_completion.description: Verify a 20-period Simple Moving Average (SMA) is added to the chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An indicator line is drawn on the chart candles, and the chart's top-left corner or indicator legend explicitly lists 'SMA (20)' or similar text indicating a 20-period Simple Moving Average.

task_completion.description: Verify the workspace was saved to persist settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the agent clicking 'Workspaces' -> 'Save' in the Control Center, or the workspace menu shows the current workspace without an unsaved indicator (like a grey diamond or asterisk).

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual NinjaTrader 8 GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the genuine NinjaTrader 8 interface (Control Center, Chart windows) being clicked and typed into, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the GUI by directly editing workspace XML files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration steps (adding indicators, enabling Chart Trader) should be visible through GUI menus and dialog boxes, not terminal commands editing files in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces.

integrity.description: Verify the chart displays actual market data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SPY chart should display actual candlestick or bar data representing price movements, not a blank or error-filled chart window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: SPY (State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust) is a valid instrument. Sim101 is the default built-in simulation account in NinjaTrader 8. SMA (Simple Moving Average) is a standard technical indicator; a 20-period SMA is commonly used and will appear as 'SMA(20)' or similar in the chart legend. The Chart Trader is a specific panel in NinjaTrader 8 that attaches to the right side of a chart for quick order entry. The standard workspace directory is C:\Users\[username]\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces.
